# Reports Directory

This directory contains auto-generated reports from agents.

## Report Types

- `post-implementation-{feature-id}-{timestamp}.md` - Generated by Post-Implementation Agent
- `review-{feature-id}-{timestamp}.md` - Generated by Code Review Agent (if used)

## Retention

Reports are kept for 90 days, then archived or deleted to prevent clutter.

## Auto-Generated

These reports are created automatically - do not manually create files here.
